TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_lubi 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: laqi nii keeman di ma gaga tloong gakacna m.
S.PHON: laqi nii keeman di ma gaga tlooŋ gakaʦna m.
S.FORM: laqi nii keeman di ma gaga tloong gakacna m.
S.PHON: laqi nii keeman di ma gaga tlooŋ gakaʦna m.
S.TRANSL: 已經晚上了,然後這個小孩正坐在他的椅子上.
It was night already, and the kid was sitting on his chair.

S.FORM: a la kana a siyo a? taqianna qlapona ma gaga a qmita huling nii a wa theyaq huling qmita kana anu ka anu ka qpatun.
S.PHON: a la kana a sijo a? taqianna qlapona ma gaga a qmita ħuliŋ nii a wa tħejaq ħuliŋ qmita kana anu ka anu ka qpatun.
S.FORM: a la kana a siyo a? taqianna qlapona ma gaga a qmita huling nii a wa theyaq huling qmita kana anu ka anu ka qpatun.
S.PHON: a la kana a sijo a? taqianna qlapona ma gaga a qmita ħuliŋ nii a wa tħejaq ħuliŋ qmita kana anu ka anu ka qpatun.

TRANSL.notes: (他坐) 在房間裡的床舖旁邊,一面看著他的狗玩耍,一面看著一隻青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 在房間裡的床舖旁邊,一面看著他的狗玩耍,一面看著一隻青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) was (sitting) next to his bed in his room, watching his dog playing, and looking at a frog.

S.TRANSL: was next to his bed in his room, watching his dog playing, and looking at a frog.

S.FORM: a mrebu di ma ga m tutui ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: a mɾebu di ma ga m tutui ka laqi nii di.
S.FORM: a mrebu di ma ga m tutui ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: a mɾebu di ma ga m tutui ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 到了早上了,小孩起床了.
In the morning, the kid got up from bed.

S.FORM: ei ei waga mtaqi di w keeman di ma ga mosa a taqi qlapo taqianna ka laqi nii.
S.PHON: ei ei waga mtaqi di w keeman di ma ga mosa a taqi qlapo taqianna ka laqi nii.
S.FORM: ei ei waga mtaqi di w keeman di ma ga mosa a taqi qlapo taqianna ka laqi nii.
S.PHON: ei ei waga mtaqi di w keeman di ma ga mosa a taqi qlapo taqianna ka laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 咦?不對.他還在睡覺.晚上的時候,這個小孩在他的房間裡上床睡覺.
Well, no, that's not right. He is still sleeping. At night, this kid goes to sleep on the bed in his room.

S.FORM: ma waga naq a a hiya ka anu ka asi huling uri o siyona om suupu taqi ga meniq a? qpatun nii uri waga nanaq ptaqiun so a henu anu ka a so kiya na hiya.
S.PHON: ma waga naq a a ħija ka anu ka asi ħuliŋ uɾi o sijona om suupu taqi ga meniq a? qpatun nii uɾi waga nanaq ptaqiun so a ħenu anu ka a so kija na ħija.
S.FORM: ma waga naq a a hiya ka anu ka asi huling uri o siyona om suupu taqi ga meniq a? qpatun nii uri waga nanaq ptaqiun so a henu anu ka a so kiya na hiya.
S.PHON: ma waga naq a a ħija ka anu ka asi ħuliŋ uɾi o sijona om suupu taqi ga meniq a? qpatun nii uɾi waga nanaq ptaqiun so a ħenu anu ka a so kija na ħija.
S.TRANSL: 在那邊呢,狗也在他旁邊一起睡覺.青蛙也在一旁自己睡覺.
There, the dog is also beside him, sleeping together. The frog is also there, sleeping by itself. It's just like that.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka mgrebu di na waga a tutui ka laqi nii di ma dahaka hulingna.
S.PHON: ma kija ka mgɾebu di na waga a tutui ka laqi nii di ma daħaka ħuliŋna.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka mgrebu di na waga a tutui ka laqi nii di ma dahaka hulingna.
S.PHON: ma kija ka mgɾebu di na waga a tutui ka laqi nii di ma daħaka ħuliŋna.
S.TRANSL: 到了早上,小孩和他的狗都起床了.
In the morning, the kid and his dog get up.

S.FORM: waga mqiri so bais so nganguc ma mqiri so anu ka anu ka a dheranna.
S.PHON: waga mqiɾi so bais so ŋaŋuʦ ma mqiɾi so anu ka anu ka a dħeɾanna.
S.FORM: waga mqiri so bais so nganguc ma mqiri so anu ka anu ka a dheranna.
S.PHON: waga mqiɾi so bais so ŋaŋuʦ ma mqiɾi so anu ka anu ka a dħeɾanna.
S.TRANSL: 他們都在往窗外看外面的景色.
They are looking towards the window, looking at the view outside.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka gaga a theyaq hulingna laqi nii wa theyaq hulingna laqi nii wa so wa gmuulah hulingna ma wagana angalun ka anu ka psapingna wagana nangi so anu ka a so a mcebu anu ka n la anu ka huling nii.
S.PHON: ma kija ka gaga a tħejaq ħuliŋna laqi nii wa tħejaq ħuliŋna laqi nii wa so wa gmuulaħ ħuliŋna ma wagana aŋalun ka anu ka psapiŋna wagana naŋi so anu ka a so a mʦebu anu ka n la anu ka ħuliŋ nii.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka gaga a theyaq hulingna laqi nii wa theyaq hulingna laqi nii wa so wa gmuulah hulingna ma wagana angalun ka anu ka psapingna wagana nangi so anu ka a so a mcebu anu ka n la anu ka huling nii.
S.PHON: ma kija ka gaga a tħejaq ħuliŋna laqi nii wa tħejaq ħuliŋna laqi nii wa so wa gmuulaħ ħuliŋna ma wagana aŋalun ka anu ka psapiŋna wagana naŋi so anu ka a so a mʦebu anu ka n la anu ka ħuliŋ nii.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在跟狗玩耍、逗牠、故意拿鞋子丟牠.
The kid is playing with his dog, teasing him, and deliberately throwing his shoes to him.

S.FORM: ma kiya ka kiya ka bobona dung waga anu ka musa mqir mqiri kndalax bais ka laqi nii dahaka huling nii a mus uh a musa mqiri nganguc di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka kija ka bobona duŋ waga anu ka musa mqiɾ mqiɾi kndalax bais ka laqi nii daħaka ħuliŋ nii a mus uħ a musa mqiɾi ŋaŋuʦ di.
S.FORM: ma kiya ka kiya ka bobona dung waga anu ka musa mqir mqiri kndalax bais ka laqi nii dahaka huling nii a mus uh a musa mqiri nganguc di.
S.PHON: ma kija ka kija ka bobona duŋ waga anu ka musa mqiɾ mqiɾi kndalax bais ka laqi nii daħaka ħuliŋ nii a mus uħ a musa mqiɾi ŋaŋuʦ di.
S.TRANSL: 後來呢,小孩和狗便向窗外探頭.
Afterwards, the kid and the dog poke their heads out of the window.

S.FORM: ma kiya laqi nii ga naq mqiri kndalax nganguc waga mita hulingna waga musa tmalang nganguc.
S.PHON: ma kija laqi nii ga naq mqiɾi kndalax ŋaŋuʦ waga mita ħuliŋna waga musa tmalaŋ ŋaŋuʦ.
S.FORM: ma kiya laqi nii ga naq mqiri kndalax nganguc waga mita hulingna waga musa tmalang nganguc.
S.PHON: ma kija laqi nii ga naq mqiɾi kndalax ŋaŋuʦ waga mita ħuliŋna waga musa tmalaŋ ŋaŋuʦ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從窗戶往外看,而小狗則跑到了外面去.
The kid was looking outward from the window, and the dog ran to the outside.

S.FORM: uh musa a so dmidin a m maanu di a o musa t tum waga so eniqan kana qhuni ma so sudu ga musa so tmalang waga musa theyaq nganguc ka huling.
S.PHON: uħ musa a so dmidin a m maanu di a o musa t tum waga so eniqan kana qħuni ma so sudu ga musa so tmalaŋ waga musa tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ ka ħuliŋ.
S.FORM: uh musa a so dmidin a m maanu di a o musa t tum waga so eniqan kana qhuni ma so sudu ga musa so tmalang waga musa theyaq nganguc ka huling.
S.PHON: uħ musa a so dmidin a m maanu di a o musa t tum waga so eniqan kana qħuni ma so sudu ga musa so tmalaŋ waga musa tħejaq ŋaŋuʦ ka ħuliŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他們去拿,啊什麼啊?(外面)那邊有樹和草.而小狗是要跑到外面去玩.

S.TRANSL: 他們去拿,啊什麼啊? 那邊有樹和草.而小狗是要跑到外面去玩.

TRANSL.notes: They went to bring, wait, what? There were trees and grass (outside), and the dog ran to go play out there.

S.TRANSL: They went to bring, wait, what? There were trees and grass , and the dog ran to go play out there.

S.FORM: kika wagana osaan anu ka anu ka anu ka memux ka hulingna nii di wagana lexu wana emuxun memux wana theyaqan nganguc hii kika wa mosa a mkkesa so uyung a sapahna.
S.PHON: kika wagana osaan anu ka anu ka anu ka memux ka ħuliŋna nii di wagana lexu wana emuxun memux wana tħejaqan ŋaŋuʦ ħii kika wa mosa a mkkesa so ujuŋ a sapaħna.
S.FORM: kika wagana osaan anu ka anu ka anu ka memux ka hulingna nii di wagana lexu wana emuxun memux wana theyaqan nganguc hii kika wa mosa a mkkesa so uyung a sapahna.
S.PHON: kika wagana osaan anu ka anu ka anu ka memux ka ħuliŋna nii di wagana lexu wana emuxun memux wana tħejaqan ŋaŋuʦ ħii kika wa mosa a mkkesa so ujuŋ a sapaħna.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩) 到外面去抱住他的狗,一面玩耍、一面追逐跑到屋後.

S.TRANSL: 到外面去抱住他的狗,一面玩耍、一面追逐跑到屋後.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) went out to hug his dog, (the two) playing and chasing each other to the back of the house.

S.TRANSL: went out to hug his dog, playing and chasing each other to the back of the house.

S.FORM: kika wa musa so uyung sapahna di ma waga so a mlawa ka laqi nii ma wa m waga naq lmeun mlawa ka huling nii duri.
S.PHON: kika wa musa so ujuŋ sapaħna di ma waga so a mlawa ka laqi nii ma wa m waga naq lmeun mlawa ka ħuliŋ nii duɾi.
S.FORM: kika wa musa so uyung sapahna di ma waga so a mlawa ka laqi nii ma wa m waga naq lmeun mlawa ka huling nii duri.
S.PHON: kika wa musa so ujuŋ sapaħna di ma waga so a mlawa ka laqi nii ma wa m waga naq lmeun mlawa ka ħuliŋ nii duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 來到了房子的後面呢,小孩便開始呼喊,小狗也跟著吠叫呼喊著.
As they go to the back of the house, the kid starts calling out, and the dog is also barking to call out.

S.FORM: kiyoko waga musa a mita anu ka wa hu mita qhuni a so a so tghngali so sipona sapahna ma waga a eniqan a qitaanna wa eniqan kingan a beling beling ka qhuni nii ma eniqan ka so anu ka anu ka rudu walu.
S.PHON: kijoko waga musa a mita anu ka wa ħu mita qħuni a so a so tgħŋali so sipona sapaħna ma waga a eniqan a qitaanna wa eniqan kiŋan a beliŋ beliŋ ka qħuni nii ma eniqan ka so anu ka anu ka ɾudu walu.
S.FORM: kiyoko waga musa a mita anu ka wa hu mita qhuni a so a so tghngali so sipona sapahna ma waga a eniqan a qitaanna wa eniqan kingan a beling beling ka qhuni nii ma eniqan ka so anu ka anu ka rudu walu.
S.PHON: kijoko waga musa a mita anu ka wa ħu mita qħuni a so a so tgħŋali so sipona sapaħna ma waga a eniqan a qitaanna wa eniqan kiŋan a beliŋ beliŋ ka qħuni nii ma eniqan ka so anu ka anu ka ɾudu walu.
S.TRANSL: 在更遠處,房子的對面有一棵樹.樹上有一個洞,裡面有顆蜂窩.
Farther away, there was a tree right across from the house. There was a hole in the tree, where there was a beehive.

S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii dahaka a anu ka huling nii de o mosa betaq so a pusu qhuni di ma.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii daħaka a anu ka ħuliŋ nii de o mosa betaq so a pusu qħuni di ma.
S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii dahaka a anu ka huling nii de o mosa betaq so a pusu qhuni di ma.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii daħaka a anu ka ħuliŋ nii de o mosa betaq so a pusu qħuni di ma.
S.TRANSL: 所以小孩和狗就前往,到達了樹根處.
So the kid and the dog went to the root of the tree.

S.FORM: gaga musa mita anu ka so rudu a walu ka wada a waga musa skiya ka walu di.
S.PHON: gaga musa mita anu ka so ɾudu a walu ka wada a waga musa skija ka walu di.
S.FORM: gaga musa mita anu ka so rudu a walu ka wada a waga musa skiya ka walu di.
S.PHON: gaga musa mita anu ka so ɾudu a walu ka wada a waga musa skija ka walu di.
S.TRANSL: 他們看著蜂窩.裡面有蜜蜂正飛出來.
They were looking at the beehive. There were bees flying out of it.

S.FORM: ma kika w waga so hatang a mpdaking qhuni ka huling nii gaga a lmeun so walu nii ma ws skiya kana ka walu nii gisu meyah a nganguc so anu ka a so m mqiyuc laqi nii ma kana a qpatun nii duri waga so sklyui sklui di.
S.PHON: ma kika w waga so ħataŋ a mpdakiŋ qħuni ka ħuliŋ nii gaga a lmeun so walu nii ma ws skija kana ka walu nii gisu mejaħ a ŋaŋuʦ so anu ka a so m mqijuʦ laqi nii ma kana a qpatun nii duɾi waga so skljui sklui di.
S.FORM: ma kika w waga so hatang a mpdaking qhuni ka huling nii gaga a lmeun so walu nii ma ws skiya kana ka walu nii gisu meyah a nganguc so anu ka a so m mqiyuc laqi nii ma kana a qpatun nii duri waga so sklyui sklui di.
S.PHON: ma kika w waga so ħataŋ a mpdakiŋ qħuni ka ħuliŋ nii gaga a lmeun so walu nii ma ws skija kana ka walu nii gisu mejaħ a ŋaŋuʦ so anu ka a so m mqijuʦ laqi nii ma kana a qpatun nii duɾi waga so skljui sklui di.
S.TRANSL: 狗正準備要爬到樹上,對著所有飛出來的蜜蜂吠叫著.很多蜜蜂飛出來要叮咬小孩和青蛙,小孩便嚇了一大跳.
The dog is preparing to climb up to the tree, barking at all the bees that are flying out. The kid is shocked, as the bees are about to bite him and the frog.

S.FORM: ma kika mhedu wadadaha angalun ka anu ptutingun ka anu ka rudu walu nii di mos kiya kana walu nii wa mosa a mdakin qwa wa o so mita mdakin baro ka mita a qhuni baro ka huling nii ma kana qpatun.
S.PHON: ma kika mħedu wadadaħa aŋalun ka anu ptutiŋun ka anu ka ɾudu walu nii di mos kija kana walu nii wa mosa a mdakin qwa wa o so mita mdakin baɾo ka mita a qħuni baɾo ka ħuliŋ nii ma kana qpatun.
S.FORM: ma kika mhedu wadadaha angalun ka anu ptutingun ka anu ka rudu walu nii di mos kiya kana walu nii wa mosa a mdakin qwa wa o so mita mdakin baro ka mita a qhuni baro ka huling nii ma kana qpatun.
S.PHON: ma kika mħedu wadadaħa aŋalun ka anu ptutiŋun ka anu ka ɾudu walu nii di mos kija kana walu nii wa mosa a mdakin qwa wa o so mita mdakin baɾo ka mita a qħuni baɾo ka ħuliŋ nii ma kana qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他們把蜂巢打落之後,狗就往樹上看,連青蛙也是.
After they hit down the beehive, the dog looked up at the tree, and so did the frog.

S.FORM: ma s sa ma o musa mita dungan ka siyona so lmiqu nii di ma.
S.PHON: ma s sa ma o musa mita duŋan ka sijona so lmiqu nii di ma.
S.FORM: ma s sa ma o musa mita dungan ka siyona so lmiqu nii di ma.
S.PHON: ma s sa ma o musa mita duŋan ka sijona so lmiqu nii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們又往山的另一邊看.
Then they went to look again to the other side of the mountains.

S.FORM: eniqan kingan a so anu ka eniqan kingan so qhuni paru a so a lmiqu ki so kdere hari eniqan beling ka qhuni.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋan a so anu ka eniqan kiŋan so qħuni paɾu a so a lmiqu ki so kdeɾe ħaɾi eniqan beliŋ ka qħuni.
S.FORM: eniqan kingan a so anu ka eniqan kingan so qhuni paru a so a lmiqu ki so kdere hari eniqan beling ka qhuni.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋan a so anu ka eniqan kiŋan so qħuni paɾu a so a lmiqu ki so kdeɾe ħaɾi eniqan beliŋ ka qħuni.
S.TRANSL: 在某處緩坡的地方有一棵大樹,樹上有一個洞穴.
There is a big tree at a shalow slope, and there is hole in the tree.

S.FORM: ma wada a mdaking anu ka baro hii ka laqi nii ma ga mosa mita belingna ma kika musa mita belingna di ma ini kelai ka a kndalax a truma meyah ka anu ka tekung tekung di ma.
S.PHON: ma wada a mdakiŋ anu ka baɾo ħii ka laqi nii ma ga mosa mita beliŋna ma kika musa mita beliŋna di ma ini kelai ka a kndalax a tɾuma mejaħ ka anu ka tekuŋ tekuŋ di ma.
S.FORM: ma wada a mdaking anu ka baro hii ka laqi nii ma ga mosa mita belingna ma kika musa mita belingna di ma ini kelai ka a kndalax a truma meyah ka anu ka tekung tekung di ma.
S.PHON: ma wada a mdakiŋ anu ka baɾo ħii ka laqi nii ma ga mosa mita beliŋna ma kika musa mita beliŋna di ma ini kelai ka a kndalax a tɾuma mejaħ ka anu ka tekuŋ tekuŋ di ma.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬到樹上看洞穴,突然從洞穴裡跑出一隻貓頭鷹.
The kid climbed up the tree to look at the whole, and all of a sudden an owl came out of that hole.

S.FORM: qmita ka laqi wada sklui wa w mtakun di takun a tuting dheran ma kika so nii a kdere kana nii di ma wa so a wa musa tmalang ka huling nii wa musa tmalang mita laqi ga takun.
S.PHON: qmita ka laqi wada sklui wa w mtakun di takun a tutiŋ dħeɾan ma kika so nii a kdeɾe kana nii di ma wa so a wa musa tmalaŋ ka ħuliŋ nii wa musa tmalaŋ mita laqi ga takun.
S.FORM: qmita ka laqi wada sklui wa w mtakun di takun a tuting dheran ma kika so nii a kdere kana nii di ma wa so a wa musa tmalang ka huling nii wa musa tmalang mita laqi ga takun.
S.PHON: qmita ka laqi wada sklui wa w mtakun di takun a tutiŋ dħeɾan ma kika so nii a kdeɾe kana nii di ma wa so a wa musa tmalaŋ ka ħuliŋ nii wa musa tmalaŋ mita laqi ga takun.

TRANSL.notes: 看到了(貓頭鷹)後,小孩嚇了一跳,然後就從山坡上跌了下去.然後狗便跑去看正掉落的小孩.

S.TRANSL: 看到了 後,小孩嚇了一跳,然後就從山坡上跌了下去.然後狗便跑去看正掉落的小孩.

TRANSL.notes: Seeing (the owl), the kid is shocked, and falls from the cliff. The dog runs to see the child, who is falling.

S.TRANSL: Seeing , the kid is shocked, and falls from the cliff. The dog runs to see the child, who is falling.

S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii o wa musa so a o meyah dungan ka anu ka anu ka tekung nii gisu meyah skiya dungan ma w.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii o wa musa so a o mejaħ duŋan ka anu ka anu ka tekuŋ nii gisu mejaħ skija duŋan ma w.
S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii o wa musa so a o meyah dungan ka anu ka anu ka tekung nii gisu meyah skiya dungan ma w.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii o wa musa so a o mejaħ duŋan ka anu ka anu ka tekuŋ nii gisu mejaħ skija duŋan ma w.
S.TRANSL: 然後,貓頭鷹又飛過來.
Then, the owl comes flying again.

S.FORM: w wa so a sklui ka laqi nii o miicu mesa qiyucuntana eyahuntana gmatuk tunux kana so.
S.PHON: w wa so a sklui ka laqi nii o miiʦu mesa qijuʦuntana ejaħuntana gmatuk tunux kana so.
S.FORM: w wa so a sklui ka laqi nii o miicu mesa qiyucuntana eyahuntana gmatuk tunux kana so.
S.PHON: w wa so a sklui ka laqi nii o miiʦu mesa qijuʦuntana ejaħuntana gmatuk tunux kana so.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇了一跳,心理很害怕,說:「牠要來咬我們了!牠要來啄我們的頭了!」
Being shocked, the kid was afraid, and said "It is coming to bite us! It is coming to peck on our heads!"

S.FORM: a nhuwaun mubung hari ka tunuxna so m mgleeng musa ini m kika wada mdakin a bale a bobo a btunux paru ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: a nħuwaun mubuŋ ħaɾi ka tunuxna so m mgleeŋ musa ini m kika wada mdakin a bale a bobo a btunux paɾu ka laqi nii di.
S.FORM: a nhuwaun mubung hari ka tunuxna so m mgleeng musa ini m kika wada mdakin a bale a bobo a btunux paru ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: a nħuwaun mubuŋ ħaɾi ka tunuxna so m mgleeŋ musa ini m kika wada mdakin a bale a bobo a btunux paɾu ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 小孩把頭擋住,只好爬到一個大石頭上面躲起來.
The kid covered his head, and could only hide by climbing up to a large stone.

S.FORM: waga dmeeda hiya ka w w cida qhuni hiya ka uN anu ka tekung nii di ma wa qmita laqi nii wa naq tloong a toma pusu ah wa naq toma a btunux paru hii ka anu ka huling.
S.PHON: waga dmeeda ħija ka w w ʦida qħuni ħija ka un anu ka tekuŋ nii di ma wa qmita laqi nii wa naq tlooŋ a toma pusu aħ wa naq toma a btunux paɾu ħii ka anu ka ħuliŋ.
S.FORM: waga dmeeda hiya ka w w cida qhuni hiya ka uN anu ka tekung nii di ma wa qmita laqi nii wa naq tloong a toma pusu ah wa naq toma a btunux paru hii ka anu ka huling.
S.PHON: waga dmeeda ħija ka w w ʦida qħuni ħija ka un anu ka tekuŋ nii di ma wa qmita laqi nii wa naq tlooŋ a toma pusu aħ wa naq toma a btunux paɾu ħii ka anu ka ħuliŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 貓頭鷹(站)在樹枝上眺望,看到了小孩,獨自坐在樹枝下和石頭下.狗也在那裏.

S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹 在樹枝上眺望,看到了小孩,獨自坐在樹枝下和石頭下.狗也在那裏.

TRANSL.notes: The owl searched (standing) on a tree branch, and saw the kid, who was sitting by himself below the tree root, and below the stone. The dog was there, too.

S.TRANSL: The owl searched on a tree branch, and saw the kid, who was sitting by himself below the tree root, and below the stone. The dog was there, too.

S.FORM: kika anu ka kika wa musa laqi nii dungan waga naq wa tloong ci a cida qhuni ga ka anu ka tekung ma ga qmita dheya ma laqi nii o.
S.PHON: kika anu ka kika wa musa laqi nii duŋan waga naq wa tlooŋ ʦi a ʦida qħuni ga ka anu ka tekuŋ ma ga qmita dħeja ma laqi nii o.
S.FORM: kika anu ka kika wa musa laqi nii dungan waga naq wa tloong ci a cida qhuni ga ka anu ka tekung ma ga qmita dheya ma laqi nii o.
S.PHON: kika anu ka kika wa musa laqi nii duŋan waga naq wa tlooŋ ʦi a ʦida qħuni ga ka anu ka tekuŋ ma ga qmita dħeja ma laqi nii o.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹還駐足在樹枝上看他們.
The owl still sat on the branch, looking at them.

S.FORM: wa musa a mdakin anu ka so a so bobo btutux wa mosa taapa tunux anu ka tunux anu tunux a wangjile.
S.PHON: wa musa a mdakin anu ka so a so bobo btutux wa mosa taapa tunux anu ka tunux anu tunux a waŋjile.
S.FORM: wa musa a mdakin anu ka so a so bobo btutux wa mosa taapa tunux anu ka tunux anu tunux a wangjile.
S.PHON: wa musa a mdakin anu ka so a so bobo btutux wa mosa taapa tunux anu ka tunux anu tunux a waŋjile.

TRANSL.notes: (小孩) 爬到石頭上,結果騎到了一個東西的頭上.我忘記了.

S.TRANSL: 爬到石頭上,結果騎到了一個東西的頭上.我忘記了.

TRANSL.notes: (The kid) climbed up the stone, and ended up riding on the head of something. I forgot.

S.TRANSL: climbed up the stone, and ended up riding on the head of something. I forgot.

S.FORM: mosa taapa a taapa tunux a camac.
S.PHON: mosa taapa a taapa tunux a ʦamaʦ.
S.FORM: mosa taapa a taapa tunux a camac.
S.PHON: mosa taapa a taapa tunux a ʦamaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 他騎到了一個動物的頭上.
He went riding on the head of an animal.

S.FORM: wa musa a taapa tunuxna camac ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: wa musa a taapa tunuxna ʦamaʦ ka laqi nii di.
S.FORM: wa musa a taapa tunuxna camac ka laqi nii di.
S.PHON: wa musa a taapa tunuxna ʦamaʦ ka laqi nii di.
S.TRANSL: 他騎到了一個動物的頭上.
He ends up riding on the head of an animal.

S.FORM: waga a tmalang ka anu ka anu ka camac.
S.PHON: waga a tmalaŋ ka anu ka anu ka ʦamaʦ.
S.FORM: waga a tmalang ka anu ka anu ka camac.
S.PHON: waga a tmalaŋ ka anu ka anu ka ʦamaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 這隻動物在跑.
The animal is running.

S.FORM: buyiyangba wanglezhege wangjile.
S.PHON: bujijaŋba waŋle*ħege waŋjile.
S.FORM: buyiyangba wanglezhege wangjile.
S.PHON: bujijaŋba waŋle*ħege waŋjile.
S.TRANSL: 不一樣吧.忘了這個.忘記了.
It might be different. I forgot this part. I forgot.

S.FORM: kiya ka nii ka wada musa betaq so a tmalang hiya ka a rqenux rqenux nii di ma musa so bobo kdere di ma wada.
S.PHON: kija ka nii ka wada musa betaq so a tmalaŋ ħija ka a ɾqenux ɾqenux nii di ma musa so bobo kdeɾe di ma wada.
S.FORM: kiya ka nii ka wada musa betaq so a tmalang hiya ka a rqenux rqenux nii di ma musa so bobo kdere di ma wada.
S.PHON: kija ka nii ka wada musa betaq so a tmalaŋ ħija ka a ɾqenux ɾqenux nii di ma musa so bobo kdeɾe di ma wada.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿跑到懸崖邊.
This deer runs to the edge of a cliff.

S.FORM: takun ka laqi nii kndalax kdere wada takun a betaq a truma a so eniqan qsiya so gcilung.
S.PHON: takun ka laqi nii kndalax kdeɾe wada takun a betaq a tɾuma a so eniqan qsija so gʦiluŋ.
S.FORM: takun ka laqi nii kndalax kdere wada takun a betaq a truma a so eniqan qsiya so gcilung.
S.PHON: takun ka laqi nii kndalax kdeɾe wada takun a betaq a tɾuma a so eniqan qsija so gʦiluŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從懸崖摔落,掉到了某個像是湖的水裡去.
The kid fell from the cliff down into some water, which was sort of like a lake.

S.FORM: wada mosa gcilung di ma.
S.PHON: wada mosa gʦiluŋ di ma.
S.FORM: wada mosa gcilung di ma.
S.PHON: wada mosa gʦiluŋ di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他掉到了湖裡.
He fell into the lake.

S.FORM: kika qhuni kana ka nii waga so a waga a hmeru ah so kdere wa takun a gcilung laqi nii di ma qmita kndalax baro ka rqenux.
S.PHON: kika qħuni kana ka nii waga so a waga a ħmeɾu aħ so kdeɾe wa takun a gʦiluŋ laqi nii di ma qmita kndalax baɾo ka ɾqenux.
S.FORM: kika qhuni kana ka nii waga so a waga a hmeru ah so kdere wa takun a gcilung laqi nii di ma qmita kndalax baro ka rqenux.
S.PHON: kika qħuni kana ka nii waga so a waga a ħmeɾu aħ so kdeɾe wa takun a gʦiluŋ laqi nii di ma qmita kndalax baɾo ka ɾqenux.
S.TRANSL: 懸崖上長滿了樹.小孩從上面跌了下去,而鹿則在上面看著.
The were trees growing on the side of the cliff, from which the child fell. The deer watched from the top.

S.FORM: kika anu ka mtakun kana dahaka huling msuupu a tuting a anu ka gcilung.
S.PHON: kika anu ka mtakun kana daħaka ħuliŋ msuupu a tutiŋ a anu ka gʦiluŋ.
S.FORM: kika anu ka mtakun kana dahaka huling msuupu a tuting a anu ka gcilung.
S.PHON: kika anu ka mtakun kana daħaka ħuliŋ msuupu a tutiŋ a anu ka gʦiluŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗都一起掉到湖裡去了.
Both he and the dog fell into the lake together.

S.FORM: kika mtuting gcilung di ma wagana angalun ka huling gagana tapaun anu ka tunuxna di so ahingna di.
S.PHON: kika mtutiŋ gʦiluŋ di ma wagana aŋalun ka ħuliŋ gagana tapaun anu ka tunuxna di so aħiŋna di.
S.FORM: kika mtuting gcilung di ma wagana angalun ka huling gagana tapaun anu ka tunuxna di so ahingna di.
S.PHON: kika mtutiŋ gʦiluŋ di ma wagana aŋalun ka ħuliŋ gagana tapaun anu ka tunuxna di so aħiŋna di.
S.TRANSL: 小孩把狗提起來,讓他騎在頭上、肩膀上.
The kid lifted up the dog, and let the dog ride on this head, his shoulders.

S.FORM: ma kika mosa wada a s mkkesa taapa mapa hulingna di kiya ka laqi nii kika mosa a mita kingan a qhuni dungan ma.
S.PHON: ma kika mosa wada a s mkkesa taapa mapa ħuliŋna di kija ka laqi nii kika mosa a mita kiŋan a qħuni duŋan ma.
S.FORM: ma kika mosa wada a s mkkesa taapa mapa hulingna di kiya ka laqi nii kika mosa a mita kingan a qhuni dungan ma.
S.PHON: ma kika mosa wada a s mkkesa taapa mapa ħuliŋna di kija ka laqi nii kika mosa a mita kiŋan a qħuni duŋan ma.
S.TRANSL: 小孩背著他的狗,又去看樹.
So the kid went carrying his dog to look at the tree again.

S.FORM: wisu ka hulingna di ma wana kesaun iya iya squwaq iya rengac wana kesaun ka hulingna.
S.PHON: wisu ka ħuliŋna di ma wana kesaun ija ija squwaq ija ɾeŋaʦ wana kesaun ka ħuliŋna.
S.FORM: wisu ka hulingna di ma wana kesaun iya iya squwaq iya rengac wana kesaun ka hulingna.
S.PHON: wisu ka ħuliŋna di ma wana kesaun ija ija squwaq ija ɾeŋaʦ wana kesaun ka ħuliŋna.
S.TRANSL: 他對著他的狗說:「別說話!別出聲!」
He says to his dog: "Don't speak! Don't make any noise!".

S.FORM: ma kika wada mdakin a so qhuni ah qhuni nii ka qhuni qhuni tngsebu nii ka laqi nii di ma dahaka huling ga mosa mita a bukui bukuy qhuni.
S.PHON: ma kika wada mdakin a so qħuni aħ qħuni nii ka qħuni qħuni tŋsebu nii ka laqi nii di ma daħaka ħuliŋ ga mosa mita a bukui bukuj qħuni.
S.FORM: ma kika wada mdakin a so qhuni ah qhuni nii ka qhuni qhuni tngsebu nii ka laqi nii di ma dahaka huling ga mosa mita a bukui bukuy qhuni.
S.PHON: ma kika wada mdakin a so qħuni aħ qħuni nii ka qħuni qħuni tŋsebu nii ka laqi nii di ma daħaka ħuliŋ ga mosa mita a bukui bukuj qħuni.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩和狗爬到了這棵已經倒了的樹上,去看樹的後面(有什麼).

S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗爬到了這棵已經倒了的樹上,去看樹的後面 .

TRANSL.notes: The kid and the dog climbed up to the tree that had fallen to see (what was there in) its back.

S.TRANSL: The kid and the dog climbed up to the tree that had fallen to see its back.

S.FORM: a musa mita bukuy qhuni ma mita bukuy waga hiya ka ga qpatun dahaka qpatun wawaga kiya.
S.PHON: a musa mita bukuj qħuni ma mita bukuj waga ħija ka ga qpatun daħaka qpatun wawaga kija.
S.FORM: a musa mita bukuy qhuni ma mita bukuy waga hiya ka ga qpatun dahaka qpatun wawaga kiya.
S.PHON: a musa mita bukuj qħuni ma mita bukuj waga ħija ka ga qpatun daħaka qpatun wawaga kija.
S.TRANSL: 他們去看樹的後面,然後看到有兩隻青蛙在那裡.
They went to look at the back of the tree, and saw two frogs over there.

S.FORM: kika waga qmita qpatun dungan ma egu ka qpatun meyah kndalax bukuy ki di meniq kndalax so a qsiya a bukuy qhuni ki di.
S.PHON: kika waga qmita qpatun duŋan ma egu ka qpatun mejaħ kndalax bukuj ki di meniq kndalax so a qsija a bukuj qħuni ki di.
S.FORM: kika waga qmita qpatun dungan ma egu ka qpatun meyah kndalax bukuy ki di meniq kndalax so a qsiya a bukuy qhuni ki di.
S.PHON: kika waga qmita qpatun duŋan ma egu ka qpatun mejaħ kndalax bukuj ki di meniq kndalax so a qsija a bukuj qħuni ki di.
S.TRANSL: 他們再看,又有很多隻青蛙從樹後面湧出來.
When they looked again, they saw many more frogs scrambling out from behind the tree.

S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii wada mangan kingan a kingan qpatun di ma wana anu ka posaun bagana di ma.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii wada maŋan kiŋan a kiŋan qpatun di ma wana anu ka posaun bagana di ma.
S.FORM: ma kika laqi nii wada mangan kingan a kingan qpatun di ma wana anu ka posaun bagana di ma.
S.PHON: ma kika laqi nii wada maŋan kiŋan a kiŋan qpatun di ma wana anu ka posaun bagana di ma.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抓起一隻青蛙,放在他的手上.
The kid grabbed a frog, and put it on his hand.

S.FORM: wada wada di dahaka dahaka hulingna nii di maha sapahdaha di.
S.PHON: wada wada di daħaka daħaka ħuliŋna nii di maħa sapaħdaħa di.
S.FORM: wada wada di dahaka dahaka hulingna nii di maha sapahdaha di.
S.PHON: wada wada di daħaka daħaka ħuliŋna nii di maħa sapaħdaħa di.
S.TRANSL: 他和他的狗便回家了.
So he and his dog go home.

S.FORM: ma meniq ka qpatun nii hbaro wg waga tloong bobo qhuni wa dmeeda dheya ka wada dmidin kingan qpatun.
S.PHON: ma meniq ka qpatun nii ħbaɾo wg waga tlooŋ bobo qħuni wa dmeeda dħeja ka wada dmidin kiŋan qpatun.
S.FORM: ma meniq ka qpatun nii hbaro wg waga tloong bobo qhuni wa dmeeda dheya ka wada dmidin kingan qpatun.
S.PHON: ma meniq ka qpatun nii ħbaɾo wg waga tlooŋ bobo qħuni wa dmeeda dħeja ka wada dmidin kiŋan qpatun.

TRANSL.notes: 接著,剩下的青蛙便坐在樹上,目送他們.其中一隻被(小孩)帶走了.

S.TRANSL: 接著,剩下的青蛙便坐在樹上,目送他們.其中一隻被 帶走了.

TRANSL.notes: Then, the rest of the frogs sat on the tree, looking at them. One of the frogs had been brought away (by the kid).

S.TRANSL: Then, the rest of the frogs sat on the tree, looking at them. One of the frogs had been brought away .
